user_query: I need a rigorous incentive-alignment assessment for the agent skills marketplace "SkillBazaar". Please: 1) Read the inputs in input/marketplace_metrics.json, input/policies.md, and input/rules.yaml. 2) Use the five-dimension framework (publisher concentration; publication velocity vs. review capacity; revenue model conflicts of interest; safety vs. growth investment ratio; enforcement asymmetry). 3) Apply the thresholds and verdict mapping from input/rules.yaml exactly. 4) Compute and report these derived indicators: top10_share (from metrics), max_review_capacity_30d = review_team_size * hours_per_reviewer_per_day * 30 * 60 / est_review_time_minutes_per_skill, safety_to_growth_ratio = safety_team_size / growth_team_size, and include the raw new_skills_last_30_days. 5) For revenue model and enforcement asymmetry, extract signals from input/policies.md (e.g., per-download revenue share, premium placement fees, fast-track or tier-based enforcement). 6) Write outputs to: (a) output/assessment.json with fields: marketplace ("SkillBazaar"), assessment_timestamp (ISO 8601), dimensions (exactly five keys: publisher_concentration, publication_velocity_vs_review_capacity, revenue_model_conflict, safety_vs_growth_investment_ratio, enforcement_asymmetry), where each dimension contains flagged (boolean), reason (non-empty string citing data and/or policy text), and metrics (object with any numeric values used); verdict (one of ALIGNED, PARTIAL, MISALIGNED, STRUCTURALLY-COMPROMISED); summary (200+ characters synthesizing findings); (b) output/indicators.csv with columns indicator,value and at least rows for top10_share, max_review_capacity_30d, new_skills_30d, safety_to_growth_ratio; (c) output/recommendations.md with 4-7 concise, actionable bullet points focused on structural reforms tied to your findings (avoid generic platitudes). Ensure the five-dimension keys and verdict strings match exactly. Keep all paths relative and write only under output/.
